info.name: HealEase — Recovery Goals
info.description: Complete test suite for Recovery Goals CRUD and milestone operations. Includes manual testing folder and automated one-click test suite with happy path, error cases, and security tests.

item.name: 📝 Manual Testing
item.description: Simple one-endpoint-at-a-time testing. No scripts, just raw requests for manual exploration. Replace {{goalId}} and {{milestoneId}} with actual values.

item.name: 🤖 Automated One-Click Test Suite
item.description: Run entire folder to execute sequential tests with automatic data chaining. Happy path → Error cases → Security tests.

item.name: ✅ Happy Path (Sequential)
item.description: Complete flow: signup, login, create goal, add milestone, update, delete. Data chains between requests automatically.

exec: pm.test('Response is array with created goal', function () {

item.name: ❌ Error Cases (Validation & Logic)
item.description: Tests for validation failures, missing fields, and business logic constraints.

item.name: 🔐 Security Tests (Auth & CSRF)
item.description: Tests for multi-user isolation, CSRF validation, and authentication requirements.
